title: galactia galactioides
intro: Galactia galactioides, also known as the coral milk pea or coral pea, is a flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galactia galactioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as a diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Galactia galactioides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
